resources.string: Unable to reach the Lyrion Dashboard server. Check that it is running and that the URL is correct.
Search for a Lyrion Music Server on the local network
Prevent the screen from turning off while the dashboard is shown
Install the Wear OS companion on your watch through the server

On the watch, enable developer options (Settings → System → About → tap the build number 7 times), then open Settings → Developer options → Wireless debugging.

1. Enter below the IP address and port shown on the wireless debugging screen (connection address).
2. The first time, also tap “Pair new device” on the watch and copy the pairing address and 6-digit code it displays.
3. Press Install: the Lyrion Dashboard server pairs with the watch and installs the app.
Pairing code (6 digits, first time only)
Installing through the server… Keep the wireless debugging screen open on the watch.
Enter the connection address as IP:port
Pairing needs both the IP:port address and the 6-digit code
The server has no adb binary — see android/README.md to enable watch installs
No watch APK on the server yet (looked at %1$s) — it will be downloaded from the latest release, or drop a CI-built APK there
The server could not find or download the watch APK
Pairing with the watch failed — check the address and code
Connection to the watch failed — check the connection address
No Lyrion server found on the network
Server URL set to %1$s — adjust the port if the app runs elsewhere
